title: Realism Tweaks
description: A mod focused on reworking the hunger system and adding more immersive game logic, such as falling anvils destroying torches below them.
body:
🧱 Realism Tweaks

Realism Tweaks is a survival balancing pack for Minecraft 1.21.4 that blends deeper hunger management, environmental realism, and a simple in-game configuration menu.

 🌾 **Key Features**

- 🍖 **Food Rank System (S–D)**
Each meal has a rank that defines its effect duration and hunger consumption multiplier. Once eaten, a nutritional buff is applied and affects all player activity.

- 💪 **Dynamic Hunger Usage**
Sprinting, swimming, crouching, item use, armor weight, and natural regeneration all affect hunger. Low-tier buffs can even passively cleanse fatigue when idle.

- ⚔️ **Armor Combat Cost**
Attacking while wearing heavy armor consumes more hunger, encouraging thoughtful combat.

- 🍲 **Informative Food Tooltips**
Display rank, hunger modifier, and buff duration, making meal planning effortless.

- 💦 **Realistic Water Impacts**
Jumping into shallow water now hurts — the shallower the pool, the stronger the damage. Deep lakes still soften the fall.

- ⚒️ **Heavy Anvils**
Placing or dropping anvils will crush soft blocks below, without reducing anvil durability.

- 🪨 **New Crafting Materials**
Adds two simple ingredients — Pebble and Charcoal Chunk — available in the Ingredients tab, ready for your custom recipes.

⚙️ **Configuration**

Three main toggles can be enabled or disabled:

- Heavy Anvils

- Water Jump Damage

- Arrows can break glass

You can configure them from the config file or via the built-in mod settings menu accessible in-game.
